chapter_title: Issuance of Licenses, Expiration, and Renewal
text: Commencing no later than July 1, 2027, the department shall issue an identification card pursuant to Section 12801.9 to an eligible applicant, other than a person described in Section 13001, who is unable to submit satisfactory proof that the applicant’s presence in the United States is authorized under federal law.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 6. DRIVERS' LICENSES [12500 - 15326]
### Chapter 1. Issuance of Licenses, Expiration, and Renewal [12500 - 13020]
#### Article 5. Identification Cards [13000 - 13008]
##### § 13001.5

Commencing no later than July 1, 2027, the department shall issue an identification card pursuant to Section 12801.9 to an eligible applicant, other than a person described in Section 13001, who is unable to submit satisfactory proof that the applicant’s presence in the United States is authorized under federal law.

*(Added by Stats. 2022, Ch. 482, Sec. 11. (AB 1766) Effective January 1, 2023.)*
